title: FTQS: Fracture Toughness Qualification Suite
description: Fracture toughness prediction for steels and high entropy alloys with finite-sample conformal prediction intervals (group-aware CV+ with pre-committed Mondrian calibration by phase class), applicability domain trust scoring with literature provenance, MMPDS-style screening allowables, diversity-aware test prioritization, and a self-auditing model card with selection-inclusive held-out-group calibration evidence. The bundled dataset is redistributed from the Materials Cloud record of Fan et al. (2023) under CC-BY 4.0.
